allow: Bash(python -m py_compile app/*.py app/agents/*.py app/mocks/*.py app/routers/*.py app/services/*.py)
PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \(-not $py\) { $py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) }; if \($py\) { $py.Source } else { "no-python" })
